response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including C and C++ (with LabWindows/CVI), but lacks recent, deep experience in modern C++ for high-performance industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), and industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443-4-1. Their expertise leans heavily toward web, mobile, and scripting (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Python), with only tangential exposure to IoT or distributed systems relevant to the role.
strengths: Strong foundational C/C++ experience with LabWindows/CVI, demonstrating low-level systems programming skills.
Proven track record in building scalable, event-driven platforms (e.g., GISCollective) and optimizing performance-critical systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling at Dunnhumby).
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and cross-functional collaboration in Agile environments.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on C++ development targeting industrial automation or on-premises/cloud platform solutions, which are core to this role.
No documented experience with IEC 62443-4-1, message brokers, or industrial protocols (e.g., Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA), which are critical for the position.
Primary expertise in web/mobile stacks (JavaScript/TypeScript, React) rather than C++-focused high-performance systems or industrial cybersecurity.
